name: ah-week
description: Use for weekly review and planning: summarize the week, update project direction, and define next week's plan.
---

# Weekly Review

Goal: close the week and set a realistic next-week direction.

## Workflow

1. Read daily notes for the current week.
2. Read active projects and `Meta/.ai-memory/STATUS.md`.
3. Summarize completed work, open loops, risks, and useful captures.
4. Create or update the weekly review in configured `weeklyReviews`.
5. Produce a next-week plan and update memory state.

## Rules

- Use real notes only.
- Keep the plan small enough to execute.
- Move stale items to later or inbox instead of carrying everything forward.
